message:
feat(FJ-P2C-002-F): differential oracle + metamorphic + adversarial validation

17 conformance tests in fj-conformance covering:
- 5 oracle comparison points (jit, grad, vmap, composition, error behavior)
- 3 metamorphic properties (jit transparency, grad linearity, vmap distribution)
- 6 adversarial cases (empty batch, scalar/vmap, double jit, grad no args,
  grad(vmap), mismatched dims)
- 1 cross-validation (value_and_grad consistency)
- 1 schema contract test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
